body.title: CLOSED: Add pyautogui driver to SWADL
body.result: driver adapter added to swadl_driver.py with tests, 756f742
body.description:
Add pyautogui as a supported interface library in SWADL. pyautogui is cross-platform (Linux/Mac/Windows), coordinate/image-recognition based, no accessibility tree required. Useful for apps that expose no AT-SPI and where Selenium isn't applicable.

**Affected files:** swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_driver.py, swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_automation.py, requirements.txt
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; new driver follows existing driver pattern in swadl_driver.py
**Scope boundary:** add the driver wrapper + config key to select it; does NOT add image-matching helpers (future ticket)
**Test plan:** unit test that pyautogui driver initialises and exposes the standard SWADL driver interface
